phrases.intent_en: Are guided tours available in English today
phrases.cultural_note: Direct and concise answer expected from staff.

likely_response.local: Ja, om 11:00 en 14:00 uur. Koop een ticket bij de ingang.
likely_response.translation_en: Yes, at 11:00 AM and 2:00 PM. Buy a ticket at the entrance.

responses.english: Yes, at 11:00 AM and 2:00 PM. Buy a ticket at the entrance.
responses.french: Ja, om 11:00 en 14:00 uur. Koop een ticket bij de ingang.

phrases.intent_en: Where do I buy visitor center tickets
phrases.text_local: Waar koop ik tickets voor het bezoekerscentrum?
phrases.cultural_note: Visitors expect a clear, central point for ticket sales; reception is the standard first contact.

phrases.intent_en: Is photography allowed in the library
phrases.text_local: Mag je fotograferen in de bibliotheek?
phrases.cultural_note: Libraries in Dutch institutions often enforce strict no-photo rules to protect documents.
Donaties kunnen gedaan worden bij de receptie of via de website van het Vredespaleis.

likely_response.local: Bij de receptie, of online via de website.
likely_response.translation_en: At the reception, or online via the website.

responses.english: At the reception, or online via the website.
responses.french: Bij de receptie, of online via de website.

phrases.cultural_note: De Japanse Kamer bevindt zich op de eerste verdieping van de linkervleugel.

likely_response.translation_en: In the left wing, first floor.

responses.english: In the left wing, first floor.

phrases.intent_en: Is silence required in court viewing areas
phrases.text_local: Moet ik stil zijn in rechtszalen?
phrases.cultural_note: Rule enforced in court areas; expect clear confirmation.
